title: Kemi-Olokode-Ayelabola Hails Nigerian Senate For Approving Life Imprisonment For Child Defilement Convict - FinancialEDGE
description: A behavioral, developmental and child/young persons care professional, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola has applauded the Senate under the leadership of His Excellency Godswil Akpabio for passing a Bill prescribing life imprisonment for anyone, male or female found guilty of sexually defiling minors. Kemi who is also the Chairperson and Conve­ner of Asiwaju Renewed Hope (ARH’23) during the
html: A behavioral, developmental and child/young persons care professional, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola has applauded the Senate under the leadership of His Excellency Godswil Akpabio for passing a Bill prescribing life imprisonment for anyone, male or female found guilty of sexually defiling minors.
